name: Dough
recipeInstructions:
Dough Program:
1. Press SELECT for Dough.
2. Press START. Dough will be ready in 1 hour and 20 minutes.
3. At the end of the program, press STOP/RESET. Dough is ready for hand-shaping, rising and baking.
Baking:
1. Place dough on a lightly floured surface.
2. Cover dough with a clean cloth and let it rest for 10 minutes.
3. Cut into halves.
4. Press each evenly into a lightly greased 12-inch pizza pan.
5. Prick the dough all over with a fork.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, until the crust is lightly browned.
7. Remove from oven and spread/sprinkle crust with your favorite pizza toppings.
8. Return to oven for an additional 10-15 minutes, until toppings are bubbling and/or melted.
